channel.title: Docs Update: How to Install a new Frontity package + Frontity Themes section
channel.description:
We have recently done some updates to our docs:
- Added a guide on [how to install a new Frontity package](https://docs.frontity.org/guides/install-a-new-package). - Added a new [Frontity Themes section](https://docs.frontity.org/frontity-themes). - Improved the [Code Contributions](https://docs.frontity.org/contributing/code-contributions) guide.
Thanks @SantosGuillamot and @luisherranz! 🙌

item.title: Docs Update: How to Install a new Frontity package + Frontity Themes section
item.dc:creator: Reyes
item.description:
We have recently done some updates to our docs:

  • Added a guide on how to install a new Frontity package.
  • Added a new Frontity Themes section.
  • Improved the Code Contributions guide.

Thanks @SantosGuillamot and @luisherranz!

Read full topic
item.source: Docs Update: How to Install a new Frontity package + Frontity Themes section
